data.body: SUSPENDED: This task (T1 for story 50d5-ac2e — add plugin boundary constraint to doc-writer.md) was suspended after implementation was started. The done definitions require hardcoding 'plugins/dso/' inside doc-writer.md, which is a distributed plugin file. The implementation is architecturally wrong. Reverted commit 3eacc31c. Story 50d5-ac2e escalated to brainstorm for re-examination.
